articles.description: England's World Cup hopes rest on captain Harry Kane after a grim taste of life without him in the defeat against Japan at Wembley, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.
articles.title: England 0-1 Japan: A failed experiment as Tuchel gets grim glimpse of life without Harry Kane

articles.description: Italy fail to qualify for a third World Cup in a row after penalty defeat by Bosnia-Herzegovina in play-off final.
articles.title: Italy miss World Cup: Bosnia-Herzegovina shootout defeat means Azzurri fail to reach tournament for third time in a row

articles.description: A Tottenham fan who has threatened to stop attending matches said it would be "unforgivable" to name Roberto de Zerbi as the club's new manager.
articles.title: Roberto de Zerbi: Spurs fans' anger grows over Italian's appointment

articles.description: Tiger Woods had two hydrocodone pills in his pocket as officers observed him acting "lethargic and slow" following his car crash in Florida last week, a police report says.
articles.title: Tiger Woods 'lethargic' and had pills in pocket at crash scene, according to police report

articles.description: Viktor Gyokeres scores a dramatic 88th-minute winner as Graham Potter's Sweden overcame Poland to reach this summer's World Cup.
articles.title: Sweden 3-2 Poland: Viktor Gyokeres winner fires Graham Potter's side to World Cup

articles.description: The World Cup includes 48 nations, but there are still a number of top players who have missed out on qualification.
articles.title: Six stars who will not be playing at the 2026 World Cup in Canada, USA & Mexico

articles.description: There are not many bad views in the impressive Hill Dickinson Stadium. But one a few yards away from Steve Clarke is among the best.
articles.title: How did Scotland defeat by Ivory Coast look from Clarke's vantage point?

articles.description: England have not beaten a side ranked in the top 20 under Tuchel and head into the World Cup with questions about their performance.
articles.title: England lose to Japan: Should Thomas Tuchel be concerned after failure to beat three top-20 teams ?

articles.description: Roberto de Zerbi is set to become Tottenham's third boss of the season - with a clear objective for the next two months.
articles.title: Roberto de Zerbi: Seven games to save Tottenham's season

articles.description: Turkey reach their first World Cup in 24 years as Kerem Akturkoglu's goal gives them a narrow win in their play-off with Kosovo.
articles.title: Kosovo 0-1 Turkey: Turkey reach first World Cup in 24 years
